items.title: Wimbledon Day 6 wrap: Swiatek crashes out, as Fritz, Tiafoe & Dimitrov advance
items.summary: All the action from day five of Wimbledon where stars such as Iga Swiatek, Taylor Fritz and Frances Tiafoe were on display. Credit: AELTC.

items.title: France find a way past Paraguay and what awaits England in Mexico? | World Cup Daily – video
items.summary: Max Rushden is joined by Barry Glendenning , Archie Rhind-Tutt, Barney Ronay and Philippe Auclair as France beat a spiky Paraguay side to reach the quarter-finals Continue reading...

items.title: ‘Gimmick’ – Mexico fans fume as England star Marc Guehi makes bold claim ahead of World Cup clash in ‘special’ Azteca
items.summary: MARC GUEHI is relishing the opportunity to battle World Cup co-hosts Mexico at the famous Azteca - but he admitted the home side are favourites. England are set to face Mexico in the last 16 in Mexico City after Harry Kane scored twice to secure a 2-1 win over DR Congo in the round of...

items.title: What time do England kick-off against Mexico tonight?
items.summary: ENGLAND take on Mexico in the last-16 of the World Cup TONIGHT. The Three Lions came from behind to beat DR Congo 2-1 to keep their hopes of global glory alive. Harry Kane was the hero once again for England as he scored two late goals to turn the match on its head. The captain...

items.title: Kyle Walker: Mexico will be a hostile cauldron, but I know this England team is ready to win ugly at the World Cup
items.summary: OKAY, this game in Mexico City is going to be difficult. With the altitude, the home advantage, the hostile crowd and all the conditions apparently in their favour. But I don't like to use it as an excuse. England will have prepared for it We can give them a little bit of benefit of the...

items.title: First Mexican to play in Premier League hails Raul Jimenez’s miracle return after injury had docs fearing for his life
items.summary: JARED Borgetti knows how hard it is for a Mexican to make it in English football. Let alone after suffering a life-threatening injury. Which is why Borgetti and all of Mexico hail Raul Jimenez as a hero. Borgetti became the first footballer from his country to play in England when he joined Bolton i

items.title: Furbank misery for Borthwick and England as poor discipline bites again
items.summary: George Furbank will miss the rest of England's summer internationals after he was withdrawn from the team to face South Africa because of appendicitis.

items.title: England enter the Azteca - where football kings are crowned
items.summary: BBC sport explores the history and cultural power of the Azteca, one of the great cathedrals of world football, as England prepare to face Mexico there in the last 16 of the World Cup.

items.title: Mexico return luxury watches gifted by YouTuber
items.summary: World Cup co-hosts Mexico - who play England on Sunday night - return luxury watches gifted to them by a content creator because Fifa rules prohibit expensive gifts.

items.title: 'Sassuolo and Bologna in Bowie transfer talks' - gossip
items.summary: Sassuolo and Bologna are reportedly in talks with Hellas Verona about Kieron Bowie, while Celtic are linked with Norwegian striker Tobias Lauritsen and three clubs are said to be chasing former Rangers loanee Mikey Moore.

items.title: England at the Azteca Stadium: a potted history – in pictures
items.summary: England return to the Azteca Stadium for the first time in 40 years as they take on co-hosts Mexico in the last 16 of the World Cup. We take a look at the games the Three Lions have played in this iconic setting. And yes, Maradona is featured Continue reading...

items.title: Mexico fans with full band, fireworks and car horns try to sabotage England hotel before meeting cops’ ring of steel
items.summary: MEXICO fans set off fireworks and turned up with a full band in a desperate bid to disrupt England's preparations for their World Cup showdown. The Three Lions are preparing to face the tournament co-hosts in a daunting last-16 clash after coming from behind to beat DR Congo. And plans to keep where
